execution_steps: Run 'loom start <task_id>' to lock active context
Check git status to ensure workspace awareness
specific details based on context: e.g., Execute sub-tasks to achieve process goal X
Ensure all process objectives are met BEFORE calling loom_complete.
Make a git commit with the implemented changes
definition_of_done: [[REPLACE_WITH_SPECIFIC_CRITERIA]]: e.g., Process goal X is achieved
loom validate passes (Checks Traces/Metadata only, DOES NOT run code tests)
